title: steiropteris glandulosa
intro: Steiropteris glandulosa is a species of fern, specifically a type of lycopodiopsida, that is commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Steiropteris glandulosa is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments.
